title: Fix stopped canister — redeploy backend to restore getAllCases

requirements.summary: Display a user-friendly error message on the Cases page when the backend is unreachable or returns a canister-stopped error, instead of showing raw rejection details
acceptanceCriteria: When getAllCases fails with a canister error, the Cases page shows 'Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.' instead of raw error details.
A Retry button is visible in the error state and triggers a re-fetch of cases when clicked.
The raw rejection/IC error text is not exposed to the user.

file_operations.description: Enhance the useGetAllCases hook to detect canister-stopped errors (Reject code 5, IC0508) and map them to a user-friendly error type. Add error type classification logic that distinguishes between canister-stopped, network errors, and other failures, storing the error type in query metadata for the UI to consume.

Update the error handling UI in CasesListView to display 'Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.' when a canister-stopped or network error is detected. Replace the current raw error display with the friendly message and add a Retry button that calls refetch() from the useGetAllCases hook. Ensure raw IC error messages (Reject code, IC0508, canister ID) are never shown to the user.
